endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.Resources/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all of the available Microsoft.Resources REST API operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions
endpoints.description: Gets all subscriptions for a tenant.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}
endpoints.description: Gets details about a specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all available geo-locations.
endpoints.description: This operation provides all the locations that are available for resource providers; however, each resource provider may support a subset of this list.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /tenants
endpoints.description: Gets the tenants for your account.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.
